code_dossier.name: AccountRoleMapper.xml
code_dossier.description: MyBatis XML mapper file for account-role relationship data access, providing SQL operations for querying user role codes and deleting account-role associations

data.detailed_description:
This is a MyBatis XML mapper configuration file that defines SQL operations for managing the relationship between accounts and roles in the account management system. The mapper is bound to the `com.zixin.accountprovider.mapper.AccountRoleMapper` Java interface through namespace declaration.

The file contains two SQL statements:
1. **selectRoleCodesByUserId**: A SELECT query that retrieves role codes (as Integer values) associated with a specific user/account from the `account_role` table. This is used for authorization and permission checking scenarios.

2. **deleteByAccountId**: A DELETE statement that removes all role associations for a given account ID. This is typically used when deleting an account or resetting user permissions.

The mapper follows standard MyBatis conventions and provides basic CRUD operations for the account-role many-to-many relationship table. It serves as the data access layer component in a typical layered architecture (Controller-Service-Mapper/DAO pattern).
responsibilities: Provide data access operations for account-role relationship table
Query role codes associated with a specific user account
Delete role associations when an account is removed or permissions are reset
Support the account management module's authorization and permission management functionality
Abstract database operations from business logic through MyBatis ORM mapping

interfaces.name: selectRoleCodesByUserId

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The account/user ID to query role codes for

interfaces.description: Retrieves all role codes associated with a specific user account from the account_role table

interfaces.name: deleteByAccountId

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The account ID whose role associations should be deleted

interfaces.description: Deletes all role associations for a given account ID, returns the number of affected rows
